mapper.insert: insert into deep_research_evidence_anchors ( anchor_id, run_id, task_id, source_type, source_id, chunk_id, path, line_start, line_end, quote_text, retrieval_score, content_hash ) values ( #{record.anchorId}, #{record.runId}, #{record.taskId}, #{record.sourceType}, #{record.sourceId}, #{record.chunkId}, #{record.path}, #{record.lineStart}, #{record.lineEnd}, #{record.quoteText}, #{record.retrievalScore}, #{record.contentHash} )
